children.heading: Commission
children.label: 1 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Federal Trade Commission.

children.heading: Internet
children.label: 2 Internet
children.text: The term “Internet” means collectively the myriad of computer and telecommunications facilities, including equipment and operating software, which comprise the interconnected world-wide network of networks that employ the Transmission Control Protocol/Internet Protocol, or any predecessor successor protocols to such protocol, to communicate information of all kinds by wire or radio.1So in original. Probably should be preceded by “or”.1
